news.headline: Hong Kong’s MTR Corporation raises €3 billion in its first public euro green bond sale
news.summary:
Hong Kong rail giant the MTR Corporation has raised €3 billion (U$3.5 billion) by selling its first euro-denominated public green bonds, in its largest bond deal to date.
The semi-privatised corporation said on Thursday that the sale also marked the largest Asia ex-Japan non-sovereign euro green bon

news.headline: Hezbollah denounces Israel-Lebanon ceasefire deal as a ‘farce’
news.summary: “We have given no commitment to anyone,” the Iranian-backed militant group's leader said after Israel and Lebanon announced a new U.S.-mediated agreement.

news.headline: Fifa bans all water bottles from World Cup games
news.summary: Fifa has been warned it is putting fans' health at risk by introducing a bottle ban at this summer's World Cup.

news.headline: Iran footballers describe how war with US-Israel affects their World Cup
news.summary: Iran national players Saeid Ezatolahi and Mohammad Ghorbani talk about how war is overshadowing a World Cup dream.

news.headline: Charges dropped against Budapest mayor over 2025 Pride march
